---
title: "FPREN Incident Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
params:
  alert_id: ""
  event_type: ""
  date_from: ""
  date_to: ""
  area_desc: ""
  mongo_uri: "mongodb://localhost:27017/"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(mongolite)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(lubridate)
  library(knitr)
  library(jsonlite)
})

MONGO_URI <- params$mongo_uri
DB_NAME   <- "weather_rss"

fpren_col <- function(col) mongolite::mongo(collection = col, db = DB_NAME, url = MONGO_URI)

# ── Resolve incident ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Look up by alert_id first, then by event_type + area + date range
primary_alert <- NULL
related_alerts <- data.frame()

if (nchar(params$alert_id) > 0) {
  primary_alert <- tryCatch({
    col <- fpren_col("nws_alerts")
    q   <- sprintf('{"alert_id":"%s"}', params$alert_id)
    df  <- col$find(q)
    col$disconnect()
    if (nrow(df) > 0) as.list(df[1, ]) else NULL
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

# Fallback: match by event_type and date range
if (is.null(primary_alert) && nchar(params$event_type) > 0) {
  start_iso <- if (nchar(params$date_from) > 0)
    format(as.POSIXct(params$date_from), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  else
    format(Sys.time() - 7*86400, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  end_iso <- if (nchar(params$date_to) > 0)
    format(as.POSIXct(params$date_to), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  else
    format(Sys.time() + 86400, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")

  related_alerts <- tryCatch({
    col <- fpren_col("nws_alerts")
    q   <- sprintf('{"event":{"$regex":"%s","$options":"i"},
                    "fetched_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                   params$event_type, start_iso, end_iso)
    df  <- col$find(q)
    col$disconnect()
    df
  }, error = function(e) data.frame())

  if (nrow(related_alerts) > 0) {
    primary_alert <- as.list(related_alerts[1, ])
  }
}

# ── Processed summary for this alert ─────────────────────────────────────────
proc_summary <- NULL
if (!is.null(primary_alert)) {
  src_id <- primary_alert[["_id"]] %||% primary_alert[["alert_id"]] %||% ""
  proc_summary <- tryCatch({
    col <- fpren_col("alerts_processed")
    q   <- sprintf('{"source_id":"%s"}', src_id)
    df  <- col$find(q)
    col$disconnect()
    if (nrow(df) > 0) df else NULL
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a) > 0) a else b

# ── Timeline from execution_log ───────────────────────────────────────────────
exec_timeline <- tryCatch({
  col <- fpren_col("execution_log")
  doc_id <- if (!is.null(primary_alert)) as.character(primary_alert[["_id"]] %||% "") else ""
  if (nchar(doc_id) > 0) {
    df <- col$find(sprintf('{"doc_id":"%s"}', doc_id))
  } else {
    df <- data.frame()
  }
  col$disconnect()
  df
}, error = function(e) data.frame())

# ── Weather context at time of incident ───────────────────────────────────────
weather_context <- tryCatch({
  incident_time <- primary_alert[["fetched_at"]] %||% primary_alert[["sent"]] %||% ""
  if (nchar(as.character(incident_time)) > 0) {
    t   <- as.POSIXct(as.character(incident_time), format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
    t0  <- format(t - 3600, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
    t1  <- format(t + 3600, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
    col <- fpren_col("airport_metar")
    df  <- col$find(sprintf('{"fetched_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}', t0, t1))
    col$disconnect()
    df
  } else {
    data.frame()
  }
}, error = function(e) data.frame())

# ── Related alarms ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
related_alarms <- tryCatch({
  incident_time <- primary_alert[["fetched_at"]] %||% primary_alert[["sent"]] %||% Sys.time()
  t   <- as.POSIXct(as.character(incident_time), format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  t0  <- format(t - 3600, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  t1  <- format(t + 7200, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
  col <- fpren_col("alarms")
  df  <- col$find(sprintf('{"created_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}', t0, t1))
  col$disconnect()
  df
}, error = function(e) data.frame())
```

# Incident Report

```{r incident-header}
if (!is.null(primary_alert)) {
  event  <- as.character(primary_alert[["event"]] %||% "Unknown Event")
  area   <- as.character(primary_alert[["area_desc"]] %||% "Unknown Area")
  sev    <- as.character(primary_alert[["severity"]] %||% "Unknown")
  sent   <- as.character(primary_alert[["sent"]] %||% primary_alert[["fetched_at"]] %||% "Unknown")
  expires <- as.character(primary_alert[["expires"]] %||% primary_alert[["ends"]] %||% "Unknown")

  cat(sprintf("**Event:** %s\n\n", event))
  cat(sprintf("**Affected Area:** %s\n\n", area))
  cat(sprintf("**Severity:** %s\n\n", sev))
  cat(sprintf("**Issued:** %s\n\n", sent))
  cat(sprintf("**Expires:** %s\n\n", expires))
} else {
  cat("**No matching incident found for the specified parameters.**\n\n")
  cat("Specify `alert_id`, `event_type`, or a date range to locate an incident.\n")
}
```

---

## Incident Description

```{r incident-desc}
if (!is.null(primary_alert)) {
  headline <- as.character(primary_alert[["headline"]] %||% "")
  desc     <- as.character(primary_alert[["description"]] %||% "No description available.")
  instr    <- as.character(primary_alert[["instruction"]] %||% "")

  if (nchar(headline) > 0) cat("**Headline:** ", headline, "\n\n")
  cat("**Description:**\n\n", desc, "\n\n")
  if (nchar(instr) > 0) cat("**Instructions:**\n\n", instr, "\n\n")
}
```

---

## AI-Generated Broadcast Summary

```{r proc-summary}
if (!is.null(proc_summary) && nrow(proc_summary) > 0) {
  cat("**Broadcast Summary** *(generated by FPREN AlertsAgent)*:\n\n")
  cat("> ", as.character(proc_summary$summary[1] %||% ""), "\n\n")
  cat(sprintf("**AI Severity Classification:** %s\n\n",
              as.character(proc_summary$severity[1] %||% "unknown")))
} else {
  cat("No processed broadcast summary found for this incident.\n\n")
  cat("*(Alert may have been received before the director was running, or was not dispatched.)*\n\n")
}
```

---

## Related Alerts in Window

```{r related-alerts}
if (nrow(related_alerts) > 1) {
  rel_tbl <- related_alerts %>%
    head(20) %>%
    transmute(
      Event    = as.character(event),
      Area     = substr(as.character(area_desc), 1, 50),
      Severity = as.character(severity),
      Issued   = as.character(sent)
    )
  knitr::kable(rel_tbl, caption = "Related Alerts in Same Window")
}
```

---

## Processing Timeline

```{r exec-timeline}
if (nrow(exec_timeline) > 0) {
  tl_tbl <- exec_timeline %>%
    transmute(
      Agent     = as.character(agent_name),
      `Model Tier` = as.character(model_tier),
      `Latency (ms)` = as.integer(latency_ms),
      Status    = as.character(status),
      Timestamp = as.character(timestamp)
    )
  knitr::kable(tl_tbl, caption = "Agent Execution Timeline")
} else {
  cat("No execution log entries for this incident.\n")
}
```

---

## Weather Context at Time of Incident

```{r weather-context}
if (nrow(weather_context) > 0 && "icaoId" %in% names(weather_context)) {
  wx_tbl <- weather_context %>%
    transmute(
      Station  = as.character(icaoId),
      City     = as.character(city),
      `Temp (°F)` = as.numeric(temp_f),
      `Wind (kt)` = as.numeric(wind_speed_kt),
      `Flight Cat` = as.character(flight_category)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Station)
  knitr::kable(wx_tbl, caption = "Weather Conditions at Time of Incident (±1 hour)")
} else {
  cat("No weather data available for this time window.\n")
}
```

---

## System Alarms During Incident

```{r related-alarms}
if (nrow(related_alarms) > 0 && "severity" %in% names(related_alarms)) {
  alm_tbl <- related_alarms %>%
    transmute(
      Name     = as.character(name %||% ""),
      Severity = as.character(severity),
      Source   = as.character(source %||% ""),
      Status   = as.character(status %||% ""),
      Created  = as.character(created_at %||% "")
    ) %>%
    head(10)
  knitr::kable(alm_tbl, caption = "System Alarms During Incident Window (±3 hours)")
} else {
  cat("No system alarms during this incident window.\n")
}
```

---

*Generated by FPREN — Florida Public Radio Emergency Network*
*`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`*
